name: captains-fish-and-chicken-brand-tokens
provenance: Exported 2026-07-09 from the live brand implementation in src/layouts/Base.astro (site launched 2026-07-08 at https://captains-fish-chicken.netlify.app). Palette derives from the owner-supplied shark-captain logo (deep navy / gold / steel / white). No Figma file exists for this engagement; the repo is the token source of truth.

colorRoles.structure: navy-700 / navy-900 — confined to the shared shell (header, footer, sticky call bar) and headings
colorRoles.conversion: gold-500 (hover gold-600) — CTAs and price pills only; engine components consume --accent-color
colorRoles.surface: cloud page background; white cards with steel-200 borders
colorRoles.body-text: ink on cloud/white; ink-soft for secondary copy

layout.cardPattern: white background, 1px steel-200 border, radius-md, shadow-sm

components.cta: gold-500 background, navy-900 text, weight 800, pill radius, shadow-sm, hover gold-600 + translateY(-1px)
components.stickyCallBar: .sticky-call shares the gold CTA treatment; mounted once in Base layout, tel: call-only
components.faqCards: white dt/dd cards with steel-200 borders, radius-md split top/bottom
components.relatedChips: white pill chips, steel-200 border, navy-700 text, gold-500 border on hover
